security.csp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' data: blob:; img-src 'self' https://*.basemaps.cartocdn.com https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://* data: blob:; connect-src 'self' https://* http://localhost:* ws://localhost:* wss://*; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src 'self' blob:;
